title: Grape fungal risk after humid period
text: Sustained leaf wetness and high humidity over several days raise the risk of fungal disease such as powdery mildew and downy mildew in grapevines. Watch for leaf spots and discoloration, especially on lower canopy leaves.

title: Coquimbo humidity and frost signals
text: The Coquimbo region recorded a humid week with elevated overnight humidity and morning leaf wetness. Frost risk remains low for the current period but humidity favors fungal development.

title: Scouting and management for grape leaf spots
text: When leaf spots appear after humid conditions, scout multiple vines across the block, confirm the pattern, and consider canopy management to improve airflow. Document affected areas before deciding on any treatment.
